message:
chore(embed,lexical): reformat long call chains and simplify match arms

Reformat multi-argument function calls in auto_detect.rs and
model_download.rs to one-argument-per-line style to stay within line
length limits. Remove redundant braces from single-expression wildcard
match arms in lib.rs across delete, index, batch_index, and commit
paths in TantivyIndex — no behaviour change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
